_comment: DUMMY DATA — Sample Wazuh alert for rule 117003 (beaconing pattern)

rule.description: NetFlow: Possible beaconing pattern from 192.168.56.30 to 203.0.113.99:443 — repeated periodic connections

analyst_notes: 8 connections to same destination every ~5 minutes with consistent byte count (~500 bytes). Classic C2 check-in pattern. Investigate: check endpoint 192.168.56.30 for suspicious processes, check DNS for 203.0.113.99 resolution history.
